verses.text: Upna lamah a thahat eite in upna zawngkhalte' ginatlohna i thuakpih ding kilawm hi; eima ut bangin i gamta kei ding hi
Midangte a upna uh hong khangin, mihoih hong suahtheihna dingun i gamta ciat ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih zong ama nopsak theihna dingin gamtalo zaw hi. Lai Siangtho sungah, “Note hong kisimmawhna thute kei tungah hong tu hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi
Lai Siangtho sungah a om thu khempeuh pen eite hilhna ding, eite in lametna nei-in i thuakzawhna ding, leh i thahat theihna dingin a kigelh ahi hi

Note in lungsim kikhatin i Topa Jesuh Khrih' Pa ahi Pasian na phatkhawm theihna dingun Pasian in thuakzawhna leh thahatna hong pia hen la, Jesuh Khrih deihna bangin gamta-in khatlekhat kithutuak takin hong omsak ta hen.

sections.sectionTitle: Gentail Mite in Zong Lungdamna Thu Za

verses.text: Tua ahih ciangin Khrih in note hong san' mah bangin midangte in Pasian a phattheihna dingun note khatlekhat na kisang un
Hih banga kong genna pen, Pasian thuman hi, ci-in a kilatna dingin pupite tungah Pasian' thuciamna a tungsak dingin, Jew mite hoihna ding

leh Gentail mite in zong ama hehpihna hangin Pasian a phattheihna dingun Khrih a hong paina hang ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, “Tua ahih ciangin Gentail mite lakah ka lungdamna nang tungah ka hong ko ding a, nangma min phatna late ka sa ding hi,” cihna leh
tua ciangin, “Gentail mite aw, ama mite tawh lungdam khawm un,” cihna leh
tua ciangin, “Gentail mi khempeuh aw, Topa phat un; mi khempeuh aw, amah phat un,” cihna leh
tua ciangin Isaiah in, “Jessi' suante khat hong khang ding a, Gentail mite a uk dingin milian hong suak ding a, ama hangin Gentail mite in lamet lungmuan'na nei ding uh hi,” cihnate a kigelh hi
Kha Siangtho' huhna tawh note' lametna a khan' semsem theihna dingin, lametna a hong piathei Pasian in, amah na upna uh hangin lungdamna leh nopsakna tawh note hong kidimsak ta hen
Thu upna sungah sanggamte aw, note mihoih hi-in, bangci gamtat ding cih thei-in, khatlekhat zong a kihilhthei dingin kong muang mahmah hi
Ahi zongin hih kong laikhakna sungah note' phawkkik dingin thu ka hong genna pawlkhatte-ah kong telkheh mahmah hi. Tua bangin ka hong telkhehna thu pen

Gentail mite tungah na a sem dingin Khrih Jesuh sawltak hih theihna ding hamphatna lianpi Pasian in kei a hong piakna hang ahi hi. Gentail mite pen Kha Siangtho in Pasian' tungah a piak, ama san'theih biakpiaknate a suahtheihna dingin Pasian kiang panin a hong pai Lungdamna Thu ka hilhna-ah siampi bangin na ka sem hi
Tua ahih manin Khrih tawh kikopin Pasian-a' ding na ka sepna-ah kei ka kisathei mahmah hi

Kha Siangtho' vangliatna tawh lim leh na lamdangte zangin, Gentail mite in Pasian thu a zuihtheihna dingun Khrih in ka thatang leh ka kam ka muk a zatna thute bekah hangtakin genin ka telkheh ding hi. Tua ahih manin Jerusalem khua panin Illyrikam gam ciangdong ka zinna khempeuhah Jesuh Khrih hangin Lungdamna Thu ka hilh khinzo hi

A tawntungin keima tup thu in: Mi khatpeuh in a patsa nasep maban, oltakin zomin a sem mi ka suahkhak lohna dingin Khrih thu a kizak ngei nailohna munte bekah Lungdamna Thu hilh ding keima utna ahi hi
Lai Siangtho sungah zong, “Ama thu a kigen ngei nailohna mite in mu ding uh a, ama thu a za ngei nailote in teltheih ding uh hi,” na kici hi.
Note kiangah ka hong paipak theihlohna pen tu-a kong genna thu hang ahi hi
Ahi zongin hih gam kiimtenga ka nasepna man khinta ing a, note tawh ka kimuhnop zong kum tampi tak pha khinta ahih manin
tu-in note tawh kimu theita dingin ka kilamen hi. Spain gam ka paikawmin note kiang ka hong nawk nuam a, note tawh tawlkhat i kikholh khit ciangin Spain gam ka paina dingah nong huh ding uh ka ut hi
Ahi zongin tu laitakin ahih leh Jerusalem khua-a Pasian mite a kihuhna a puak dingin ka va pai masa ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Masedonia gam leh Grik gamsunga om pawlpite in Jerusalem khua-a om Pasian' mi a zawngte huhna dingin sum piakding amau thu-in a vaihawmtawm uh hi

Hih pen amau ngaihsut tawmna tawh lawptakin a huh uh ahi hi. A taktakin ci lehang hih mizawngte a huh dingun a kilawm mah ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jew mite in kha thu tawh kisai nate Gentail mite hawm uh ahih manin Gentail mite in zong leitung nate tawh Jew mite a huh dingun a kilawm khat ahi hi
Amaute-a' dingin a kikaikhawm hih sumte a cingin amaute tungah apin, hih nasep ka man khit ciangin Spain gam manawh dingin ka hong paikhia ding a, note kiangah kong baang ding hi
Note kiang ka hong tun' ciangin Khrih kiang panin thupha tampi tak ka hong puakding lamtak ka thei hi
Lawmte aw, kei-a' dingin Pasian kiangah thu na hong ngetsakna dingun i Topa Jesuh Khrih i upna hang leh Kha Siangtho in a hong piak itna tawh a hong thum ka hi hi
Judea gamsunga a om thu umlo mite in kei hong gimsakkhak lohna ding leh Jerusalem khua-a a om Pasian mite-a' dingin nasepnate lungdam takin a hong san'theihna dingun thu hong ngetsak un
Tua bangin thu hong ngetsak le uh cin, Pasian' deihna ahih nak leh note kiangah lungdam takin ka hong tung ding a, note tawh nuamtakin i kimu ding hi
Nopsakna a hong pia Pasian in note khempeuh hong ompih ta hen. Amen.
